description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Fragment (lower left corner). Groom: Natan b. Yosef ha-Dimashqi. Bride: Baṭrīqa bt. Ṣemaḥ, a virgin. No details of the marriage payments or dowry are preserved. Witnesses include: David b. Aharon ha-Levi; Shemuel b. Avraham; Yeshuʿa b. Avraham ha-Levi; Efrayim b. Ṣibyān ha-Kohen; the ḥaver Natan b. Yeshuʿa ha-Levi; Yaʿaqov b. Yosef b. ʿAmram ha-Shofeṭ. There is a validation signed by ʿAmram b. Shemuel and Sahlān b. Avraham (the head of the Iraqi congregation of Fustat 1034–49 CE). Here, Sahlān has the title Segan ha-Yeshiva and his father is called Beḥir ha-Yeshiva.
description_he: כתובה, שבר (פינה שמאלית תחתונה); חתן: נתן בן יוסף הדמשקי; כלה: בטריקה בת צמח, בתולה; עדים כוללים סהלאן בן אברהם בתפקיד סגן הישיבה
